templateVersions.content:
You are a financial statement parsing expert. Extract financial line items from the provided document and normalize them to standard GAAP categories.
Return a JSON array only — no markdown, no explanation: [{"normalized_line":"Revenue","statement_type":"income_statement","fiscal_period":"FY2025","value":4250000.00,"source_page":1,"confidence":0.95}]
Rules: 1. Only extract actual financial line items (not headers). 2. Normalize names to GAAP (e.g. "Sales" → "Revenue"). 3. Values as decimals. Confidence 0.0–1.0. 4. If no tables found, return: []
Statement Type: {!$Input:statement_type} Fiscal Period: {!$Input:fiscal_period} Extracted Tables: {!$Input:extracted_tables}
Parse the financial tables above and return normalized line items as JSON.
